analysis_summary.note: Day 1 of ABO testing. Campaign launched March 23-24. All ads in learning phase. Zero complete_registration events yet, but 15 custom offsite conversion events (IDs 1379503393742648, 1100418405334956) indicate funnel activity. WAY too early for any decisions. Budget distribution within ad sets is heavily skewed — expected in early learning as Meta's algorithm explores.

classifications.reason: Day 1, $2.89 spent. Good CTR (2.60%), 1 link click, 1 landing page view, 1 custom conversion. Needs 10x more data.
Day 1, only $0.07 and 5 impressions. Got 1 click and 1 custom conversion on tiny sample — noise. Starved by ad set sibling.
Day 1, $1.60 spent, 0 clicks, 0 actions. High CPM ($30.19). Early red flag but too soon to judge.
Day 1, $2.01 spent, 1 link click, 1 landing page view, 1 custom conversion. Promising but tiny sample.
Day 1, only $0.14 and 8 impressions. Starved — no signal yet.
Day 1, $2.45 spent, 1 link click, 1 LPV, 2 custom conversions. Best custom conversion rate so far. Watch closely.
Day 1, $1.59 spent, 0 clicks, 0 actions. Zero engagement. Early concern but insufficient data.
Day 1, $0.83 spent, 1 click but no link click or landing page view recorded. Low data.
Day 1, only $0.24 and 12 impressions. Starved by sibling. No signal.
Day 1, $1.91 spent, 3 clicks, 2 link clicks, good CTR (2.19%). Strong engagement signal. No LPVs or custom conversions yet. Same creative as Test 5-A.
Day 1, $2.63 spent, 1 link click, 1 LPV, 1 custom conversion. Solid early funnel activity.
Day 1, only $0.12 and 14 impressions. Starved. No signal.
Day 1, $2.63 spent, 272 impressions (2nd highest), good CTR (1.10%), lowest CPM ($9.67), 1 post save, 1 custom conversion. BEST early signal — efficient reach + engagement.
Day 1, $0.55 spent, 66 impressions. Low CPM ($8.33), 1 link click, 1 LPV, 1 custom conversion. Good efficiency for small sample.
Day 1, $3.45 spent (highest), 243 impressions, 2 link clicks, 1 LPV, 1 custom conversion. Decent CTR (1.23%). Second ad in this set has 0 data.
Day 1, $2.74 spent, 264 impressions, good CTR (1.14%), low CPM ($10.38), 2 link clicks, 1 LPV, 1 custom conversion. Strong early metrics.
Day 1, $0.75 spent, 21 impressions, 0 clicks. Extremely high CPM ($35.71). Starved + expensive. Too early to judge.
Day 1, $2.66 spent, 139 impressions, 0 clicks. Zero engagement despite decent impressions. Early warning sign.
Day 1, $1.12 spent, 56 impressions, 1 link click, 1 LPV, 1 custom conversion. Good funnel conversion on tiny sample.

actions.reason: DAY 1 — NO ACTIONS WARRANTED. Campaign launched <24 hours ago. Total spend $30.38 across 19 ads. Zero complete_registration events but 15 custom offsite conversions indicate the funnel is active. All ads in deep learning phase. Per strategy: conservative before March 30. Next evaluation: March 26 (day 3) for early signal check, March 30 (day 7) for first real decisions.
ANOMALY: Test 8 only has 1 ad serving (52527098088938). The second ad appears to have 0 impressions. Verify it's not stuck in review or paused.

CONVERSION TRACKING: No complete_registration events detected. Seeing offsite_conversion.custom.1379503393742648 and offsite_conversion.custom.1100418405334956 — these IDs don't match the documented custom conversions (signup_v2: 1657158561999170, watch_invite_v2: 1434390078412864, purchase_v2: 935955148983273). Verify pixel firing and custom conversion setup.

EARLY SIGNAL WATCH LIST — Promising: Test 7-A (lowest CPM, post save, high reach), Test 9-A (efficient reach + clicks), Test 3-B (2 custom conversions). Concerning: Test 10-A ($2.66 spent, 0 clicks), Test 2-A ($1.60 spent, 0 clicks, $30 CPM), Test 4-A ($1.59 spent, 0 clicks).

creative_insights.winning_patterns: Too early to identify. Watch for: Test 7 ad set has lowest CPMs ($8-10) suggesting Meta's algorithm finds the 'Free Baby Shower Invitations by AI' and '$0' messaging appealing to audiences. Test 7-A also generated a post save — organic engagement signal.
creative_insights.losing_patterns: Too early to confirm. Early concern: 3 ads with $1.50+ spend and zero clicks (Test 2-A, Test 4-A, Test 10-A). These creatives may lack scroll-stopping power.
recommendations: DO NOTHING until March 26 at minimum. The algorithm needs 50+ conversions per ad set for stable learning — we have 0.
Verify complete_registration pixel is firing correctly on the landing page. Zero registrations on 19 link clicks + 13 landing page views could indicate a tracking issue.
Investigate Test 8's missing second ad — should have 2 creatives running.
The offsite custom conversion IDs (1379503393742648, 1100418405334956) should be identified — they may be tracking something useful for interim analysis.

Budget distribution within ad sets is extremely lopsided (one ad gets 80-95% of spend). This is normal for Day 1 but worth monitoring — if it persists past Day 3, it may indicate creative similarity issues triggering Andromeda suppression.

phase2_status.note: Need 5+ winners with 5+ conversions at ≤$3.00 CPA each. At current spend rate ($30/day vs expected $200/day), data accumulation is significantly slower than planned. If spend doesn't ramp to $200/day within 48 hours, budget delivery may be constrained.
